summary.text: Historical data is provided by S&P Global Market Intelligence. Real-time stock price data is provided by CBOE and 15-minute delayed consolidated tape pricing data is provided by Nasdaq UTP. Several fund data points are also provided by Finnhub.

overview.description: The Abacus FCF Real Assets Leaders ETF (ABLD) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the Abacus FCF Real Assets Leaders index. The fund tracks an index that seeks to provide exposure to US real assets companies of all sizes with strong free cash flow, earnings, and dividend yield. ABLD was launched on Dec 13, 2021 and is issued by Abacus.
infoTable: Abacus FCF Real Assets Leaders Index

holdings.infoBox: ABLD is an equity ETF with a total of 55 individual holdings. The top holdings are MPLX LP stock at 3.73%, Cheniere Energy Partners at 3.37%, Shell at 3.30%, Atlas Copco AB at 3.04%, and Rockwell Automation at 2.90%.
